sevenDay.synopsis: No problems today, as VFR conditions and NEG hazards are expected. Some patchy fog/cigs could creep in first thing tomorrow AM but will burn off/lift out quickly. Thursday AM, here comes a frontal boundary that will bring us showers and ISOLD TS during the AM/PM periods. That front is expected to stall out; our weather on Friday is largely dependent on exactly where it stalls. Cigs for Saturday AM/N1 and again Sunday AM/N1 with ongoing rain chances. Cigs return for Monday AM, showers/TS for the PM, but I see improvements thereafter.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 05 MAY - 11 MAY
